sql_array: CREATE TABLE words (id UInt32, word String, language String);
SELECT lemmatize(language, (SELECT DISTINCT word FROM words WHERE id = 1)) AS lemmatized_word FROM words WHERE id = 1;
SELECT a.N FROM (SELECT lemmatize(language, word) AS lemma, id FROM words) AS a WHERE a.id = 1;
SELECT lemmatize('en', 'running') AS lemma, a.N FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT lemmatize(language, word) AS lemma, id FROM words) AS sub WHERE id = 2) AS a;
SELECT lemmatize(language, word) AS lemma FROM words WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM words WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM words WHERE word = 'wolves'));
CREATE TABLE lemmatized_words AS SELECT lemmatize(language, word) AS lemma_word, language FROM words GROUP BY lemma_word, language;
SELECT lemma_word, COUNT(*) FROM lemmatized_words GROUP BY lemma_word HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
INSERT INTO lemmatized_words SELECT lemmatize('en', 'better'), language FROM (SELECT DISTINCT word, language FROM words);
SELECT lemmatize(language, word) AS lemma, a.N FROM (SELECT word, language FROM words) AS a JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT word FROM words WHERE language = 'en') AS b ON a.word = lemmatize('en', b.word);
ALTER TABLE words ADD COLUMN part_of_speech String;
UPDATE words SET part_of_speech = 'noun' WHERE word IN ('wolves', 'better');
SELECT lemmatize('en', (SELECT word FROM words WHERE language = 'en' AND part_of_speech IS NULL)) AS lemma FROM words WHERE id = 2;
